prompt: 帮我查一下 vitalik.eth 在以太坊主网和 Arbitrum 上的 ETH 余额，顺便看看他在以太坊上持有多少 USDC（合约地址 0xA0b86991c6218b36c1d19D4a2e9Eb0cE3606eB48）

assertions.text: Successfully resolved vitalik.eth to an Ethereum address
Retrieved ETH balance on Ethereum mainnet with a numeric value
Retrieved ETH balance on Arbitrum with a numeric value
Retrieved USDC token balance on Ethereum for the resolved address
